chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-883 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 11.02.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G. Sindh. None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. This petition is pending since 2018 without any progress. From the conduct of the petitioner, it appears that he has lost interest to pursue the petition. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
